================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 44 89 40 92 F3
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 91 101 104 100 14 12
v_in[0..5]: 16862 16840 16853 16816 15450 16221

[Bus/Temp]
vbat: 16222
vcc : 3275
temp[0..2]: 190 192 192

[MPPT]
mppt_mode: 1
vboost[0..5]: 18333 17768 17956 18494 17983 17983
power[0..5]: 1534 1700 1752 1681 216 194

[DAC]
dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1

bootcause : 0
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 142
resetcause: 0xCCD6

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 5

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
